privileged_info_summary: The task operates on synthetically seeded OpenClinica database records. The setup_task.sh script explicitly injects an audit event for subject 'DM-101' and field 'Systolic BP', changing the value from '195' to '125' by user 'mrivera' due to 'transcription error'. The target output file is '/home/ga/Documents/audit_findings.txt'.
